REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'S DEMURER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS, NOT CONCLUSIONS, IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF THIS CAUSE OF ACTION INCLUDING REPRESENTATION WITH INTENT TO DEFRAUD RESULTING IN DAMAGE AND PLAINTIFF'S RELIANCE. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED TO THE ALLEGATIONS RE: CONSPIRACY FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS SUPPORTING CONSPIRACY. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONVERSION. ORDER SIGNED. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-23-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Richard Bauman, 415.982.5230 for Defendants Santos & urrutia Associates, Inc. and Rodrigo Santos.
Gregory Reaume, 510.465.7100 for Plaintiffs 1068 Florida LLC.
Adrianne Duncan, 925.734.0990 for Defendants ACE drilling & Excavation.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's Demurer to First Amended Complaint is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the first cause of action for fraud is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts, not conclusions, in support of each element of this cause of action including representation with intent to defraud resulting in damage and Plaintiff's reliance. Demurrer is sustained to the allegations re: conspiracy for plaintiff to allege facts supporting conspiracy. Demurrer is overruled as to the cause of action for conversion. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
